description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named gcc-c++20 that runs on push to master, development, and pull-request/* branches and on pull requests to master and pull-request/* branches. The workflow has four jobs: build-gcc-cpp20-linux-stl, build-gcc-cpp20-linux-no-stl, build-gcc-cpp20-linux-stl-force-cpp03, and build-gcc-cpp20-linux-no-stl-force-cpp03. Each job runs on an ubuntu-22.04 environment, checks out the repository, sets up the build environment with specific cmake flags and compiler settings, builds the project with make, and runs tests.
